mapper.insert:
select seq_br_comment_no.nextval from dual
insert into br_comment(no, member_no, book_no, content, rating) values(#{no}, #{memberNo}, #{bookNo}, #{content}, #{rating})
mapper.select: select c.no, c.member_no as memberNo, c.book_no as bookNo, c.content, c.rating , to_char(c.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') as regDate , m.nickname , (select count(*) from br_comment_like l where l.comment_no = c.no) as likeCount , (select count(*) from br_comment_like l where l.comment_no = c.no and l.member_no = #{viewerNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}) as likedByMe from br_comment c join br_member m on m.no = c.member_no where c.book_no = #{bookNo} order by c.no desc

select c.no, c.member_no as memberNo, c.book_no as bookNo, c.content, c.rating , to_char(c.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') as regDate , b.title as bookTitle , (select count(*) from br_comment_like l where l.comment_no = c.no) as likeCount from br_comment c join br_book b on b.no = c.book_no where c.member_no = #{memberNo} order by c.no desc
select count(*) from br_comment_like where member_no = #{memberNo} and comment_no = #{commentNo}
mapper.insert: insert into br_comment_like(no, member_no, comment_no) values(seq_br_comment_like_no.nextval, #{memberNo}, #{commentNo})
mapper.delete: delete from br_comment_like where member_no = #{memberNo} and comment_no = #{commentNo}
mapper.select: select c.no, c.member_no as memberNo, c.book_no as bookNo, c.content, c.rating , to_char(c.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') as regDate , m.nickname, b.title as bookTitle , (select count(*) from br_comment_like l2 where l2.comment_no = c.no) as likeCount , 1 as likedByMe from br_comment_like l join br_comment c on c.no = l.comment_no join br_member m on m.no = c.member_no join br_book b on b.no = c.book_no where l.member_no = #{memberNo} order by l.no desc
